texto: Thinking it was easy to take a chance on things if you had nothing to lose -- politics, ideas, almost anything in fact; from the bottom of the ladder you could safely risk a fall, but the higher that you climbed the more cautious you must be.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Flavin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Thinking it was easy to take a chance on things if you had nothing to lose -- politics, ideas, al…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, coragem, risk, útil em momentos de risk e success.
